concepts.finding:
This study proposes a novel framework for identifying customers’ unmet
needs on online social media using the Context Tree through the Hierarchical Search of Concept
Spaces (HSCS) algorithm.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
The proposed method is Context Tree,
which is a tree structure expressing user context while searching for related keywords hierarchically.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

keyword wi of the primary keyword p is present, but p is not present.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
The main contribution of the Context Tree with HSCS algorithm is that the proposed method
presented a way of utilizing online social media data, focusing on idea and concept screening stages in
the early stages of the NPD process.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:

make ideas for new functions and speciﬁcations of a new product from the Context Tree.

concepts.finding:
Constructing the Context Tree Using Hierarchical Search Concept Space (HSCS) Algorithm
After the completion of data gathering and pre-processing, the Context Tree, a novel model that
represents the user’s context and unmet needs in online social media, is ready to be created.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
The Context
Tree refers to a data structure that extends branches by searching other detailed keywords related
to a speciﬁc keyword iteratively.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
The Hierarchical Search Concept Space (HSCS) algorithm is also
proposed as a method that creates the Context Tree.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
The Context Tree enables intuitive and structural insight search
for people who participate in the NPD process by summarizing documents that correspond to the
keyword array eﬀectively.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization
